perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a brown off-the-shoulder top, stands in the refrigerated aisle of a Costco warehouse. She holds a large, transparent plastic container of 'Northeast Sauerkraut White Meat Pot'. (2) The camera switches to close-ups of the ingredients: Iberico pork slices, clams, white meatballs, mushrooms, tofu, and a large bag of sauerkraut broth. (3) The setting shifts to a home dining area. A blue Staub pot is opened to reveal the steaming hot pot. The woman and another female friend wearing a hat sit at the table, using chopsticks to eat. They show expressions of delight, give thumbs up, and clap their hands.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music plays throughout. A female voice (onscreen) introduces the product with an excited, high-pitched tone. (2) An off-screen male voice provides additional commentary, discussing the value and the change in pork quality compared to previous years. (3) A sound effect of a pot lid opening followed by a subtle steam-hissing sound is heard as the food is revealed. (4) The audio concludes with both women exclaiming 'delicious' in Mandarin and making rhythmic clapping sounds to emphasize their satisfaction.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: White and yellow subtitles at the bottom translate the spoken dialogue throughout the video. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large, colorful captions appear, such as '員工必買商品之一' (One of the items employees must buy) in yellow/red, '真的好好吃' (Really delicious) with a comic-style border, and '彈到不行' (Extremely bouncy) pointing to the meatballs. (3) Price and quantity indicators like '1公斤只要255元' (1kg only 255 dollars) appear to highlight value.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro in store -> Ingredient close-ups -> Cooking/Eating demonstration and review

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in store, 1 male passerby in background at 0:18, 1 additional female friend in the eating segment.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with long black hair, wearing a brown ruffled off-the-shoulder top and a black skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with high shelves, industrial lighting, and refrigerated meat/deli sections; followed by a warm, modern home dining room with a light-colored table.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Mixed: Industrial fluorescent in store, warm domestic lighting in dining area.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Product Intro -> Component Analysis -> Experience/Testimonial
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a consumer review and recommendation for a specific Costco pre-packaged meal. It uses the 'employee must-buy' hook to establish credibility and then provides a visual audit of ingredients and a taste test to validate the product's value and flavor to the audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed review of a specific store-brand product with clear price and quality call-outs.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of 'employee must-buy' hook and high-energy Mandarin delivery.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video mimics popular short-form 'Costco Finds' content styles, focusing on high value-for-money items.
